code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:5032/api/fixtures';export const GetFixturesForSeason=async seasonId=>{const url=API_URL+'/season/';try{const response=await axios.get(url+seasonId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const PostFixture=async fixture=>{const url=API_URL;try{const response=await axios.post(url,fixture);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const GetFixtureGrid=async seasonId=>{const url=API_URL+'/grid/';try{const response=await axios.get(url+seasonId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};
